data_sources.energy_demand: US Energy Information Administration (EIA) - Real-time electricity demand data
data_sources.earthquake_data: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program - Real-time earthquake data

signal_logic.trigger: When a significant earthquake is detected by USGS in a region, monitor EIA's real-time electricity demand data for that region. A sudden spike or drop in energy demand over the following 1-2 days signals the scale of the event's impact.

entry_exit.entry: Buy or sell energy-related assets based on the direction and magnitude of the post-earthquake energy demand shift.
entry_exit.exit: Exit positions when the energy demand normalizes or the impact of the earthquake event subsides.

position_sizing.method: Scale position size based on the earthquake's magnitude and the resulting energy demand change. Larger earthquakes with bigger demand impacts warrant larger positions.
